name: Modular Rubber Speed Breaker
shortDescription: Modular rubber speed breaker with reflective studs for site and road traffic calming.
longDescription: Bolt-down modular rubber speed breaker sections for controlling vehicle speed at site entries, internal roads and pedestrian crossing points, finished with reflective yellow-and-black striping for visibility in low light. Supplied in 50mm and 75mm profile heights.

images.alt: Modular Rubber Speed Breaker supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Vehicle speed control at site entries and internal roads
